3114290.name: Chronicles of Zimoria
3114290.description:
Chronicles of Zimoria is an upcoming creature-catching RPG set in the magical and mysterious world of Zimoria. Begin your adventure as an aspiring Zimon Tamer, choosing your own path through one of three branching storylines—each filled with unique challenges, regions, and secrets.

Explore nine visually distinct regions across Zimoria, from peaceful sunlit meadows to the eerie depths of the Shadow Realm. Along the way, collect powerful Metals by conquering Battle Challenges and fill your ZiPidea by discovering and documenting over 150 unique Zimon species.

But danger lurks beneath the surface. The secretive Cult of the Marionette is working to resurrect the long-banished Puppet Master—an ancient evil whose return could plunge Zimoria into darkness once more. Only you can uncover the truth, stop their dark plans, and determine the fate of this legendary land.

Chronicles of Zimoria uses a deep, strategic turn-based battle system designed to challenge your tactical instincts.

  • Build your dream team from over 150 unique Zimon, each with their own elemental type(s), signature attacks, abilities, and personality traits.

  • Master the Attack Points (AP) system: every Zimon move has a limited number of uses before it must be restored. Choosing the right move at the right moment could mean the difference between victory and defeat.

  • Experiment with different team combinations and battle strategies as you progress across the ever-changing landscape of Zimoria.

Your journey begins in the tranquil village of Quietbrook, where you've spent your life studying Zimon taming under the guidance of your parents. But just as you’re ready to take your tamer test, your father vanishes while pursuing a challenge in the capital—and nothing is ever the same again.

Set out on an unforgettable quest to uncover the truth behind your father’s disappearance, unravel the sinister motives of the Cult of the Marionette, and rise through the ranks of tamers in a land where every decision matters.

Explore nine diverse environments, each filled with villages, routes, hidden secrets, and side quests. Whether you're investigating ancient ruins, navigating haunted woods, or confronting the darkness of the Shadow Realm, Chronicles of Zimoria offers a narrative rich with twists, choices, and lasting consequences.

  • Lillie – Your neighbor and longtime friend, Lillie dreams of exploring the world of Zimoria alongside her Zimon partner. Cheerful, competitive, and endlessly curious, she’s always on your side during the journey—but don’t underestimate her skills as a tamer!

  • Aiden – Lillie’s older brother and a seasoned Zimon tamer. Ambitious and fiercely protective, Aiden is driven by a desire to prove himself—sometimes at the cost of empathy. Beneath his hardened exterior lies a deeper story waiting to unfold.

  • The Puppet Master – The mysterious leader of the Cult of the Marionette, cloaked in secrecy and legend. His goal? To revive the ancient power he once wielded and claim dominion over Zimoria once again.

We’re so excited to bring you Chronicles of Zimoria, a project born from a deep love for classic creature-catching RPGs and the worlds they let us escape to. Our mission was to capture the magic of those timeless games while adding modern depth, branching stories, and original mechanics that feel fresh and rewarding.

Every part of this game has been crafted with care—from the lore and characters to the battle systems and world design. We can’t wait for you to explore Zimoria, meet your new favorite Zimon, and forge your own unforgettable adventure.

Thank you for being part of this journey with us!
